channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Sony’s PlayStation disc factory is already being repurposed - The Verge
item.description:
1. Sony’s PlayStation disc factory is already being repurposed  The Verge
  2. Physical disc production ending in January 2028 for new games releasing on PlayStation consoles  PlayStation.Blog
  3. Sony announces end of PlayStation discs, parts of digital store in the same day  Ars Technica
  4. PlayStation’s Physical Media-Free Future Isn’t Just Concerning, It’s Offensive  IGN
  5. Sony’s PlayStation Disc Decision Is Its Biggest Scandal In 20 Years  Forbes

item.title: Newly discovered PamStealer isn’t your typical macOS malware - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Newly discovered PamStealer isn’t your typical macOS malware  Ars Technica

  3. New malicious clipboard clone raises serious security concerns for Mac users  Macworld
  4. PamStealer is a Rust-based macOS infostealer that validates credentials through PAM  Apple World Today
  5. New PamStealer Mac malware poses as a clipboard manager to steal your login info — how to stay safe  Tom's Guide

item.title: Musk denies WSJ report that SpaceX showed AI handset prototype before IPO - Reuters
item.description:
1. Musk denies WSJ report that SpaceX showed AI handset prototype before IPO  Reuters

item.title: No, Xbox isn't shutting down Obsidian despite fresh rumors - Windows Central
item.description:
